vocab.meaning: một biểu tượng của địa vị xã hội
vocab.example: For many, a high-end timepiece serves as a status symbol that wordlessly communicates their position in society.
Collectors often feel a handcrafted mechanical watch is worth every penny due to its incredible durability and heritage.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian (vẫn bền bỉ hoặc vẫn hợp thời)
vocab.example: Unlike smartwatches that become obsolete, classic luxury watches truly stand the test of time and can be passed down through generations.

vocab.meaning: giữ vững sự tự tin/lạc quan (ẩn dụ cho việc duy trì phong thái)
vocab.example: Wearing an elegant watch helps some professionals keep their chin up during high-stakes meetings, as it boosts their self-assurance.

vocab.meaning: chi tiền (thường là một khoản lớn)
vocab.example: Aficionados are often eager to part with their money if they find a rare vintage watch with a unique historical background.
